title: loranthus meridianus
intro: Loranthus meridianus, also known as the Chinese mistletoe or Loranthus, is a parasitic plant species native to China, belonging to the Loranthaceae family. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Loranthus meridianus include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, Loranthus meridianus is often used in decoctions, infusions, or dried as a powder, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
